control.description-key: Displays a visual completeness score for a Dataverse record, highlighting missing fields to improve data quality.

property.name: boundField
property.description-key: Bind to any single-line text field on the form. The control uses it as an anchor.

property.name: fieldsToCheck
property.description-key: Comma-separated list of logical field names to evaluate for completeness (e.g. emailaddress1,telephone1,address1_city,jobtitle).

property.name: fieldLabels
property.description-key: Comma-separated list of friendly display names matching fieldsToCheck order (e.g. Email,Phone,City,Job Title).

property.name: warningThreshold
property.description-key: Percentage below which the bar turns orange (default 60).

property.name: dangerThreshold
property.description-key: Percentage below which the bar turns red (default 30).

property.name: showMissingList
property.description-key: Show or hide the list of missing fields below the bar (true/false, default true).
